Description: Used to indicate the frontlines to NPCs (where they should go and shoot at eachother)

Keys.name: Group
Keys.description: Used to indicate which frontlines are linked together

Keys.name: spectrepoint
Keys.description: Used to indicate whether only Spectres should use this frontline entity. These should be used in combination with regular frontlines

Keys.name: Capture the Flag
Keys.description: Start here in Capture the Flag

Keys.name: Capture the Flag Pro
Keys.description: Start here in Capture the Flag Pro

Keys.name: Marked for Death
Keys.description: Start here in Marked for Death

Keys.name: Marked for Death Pro
Keys.description: Start here in Marked for Death Pro

Keys.name: Last Titan Standing
Keys.description: Start here in Last Titan Standing

Keys.name: Wingman Last Titan Standing
Keys.description: Start here in Wingman Last Titan Standing

Keys.name: Free For All
Keys.description: Start here in Free For All

Notes: Enough player and NPC deaths for a specific team will make the frontlines fall back for that team
Should be used to divide the map in lines, with each line corresponding to a team
Those lines can be straight, diagonal or curved depending on your map
So, for example, the left side of a map (near the starting milita spawn) should be ONLY militia info_frontlines
And the right side, should be ONLY IMC info_frontlines
Make sure to set each of the info_frontlines in the same line to the same group
